title: DRE
description: Dinosaurs Ruled Everything! A Jurassicraft successor
body:
A revisit to the old but gold, Jurassicraft, brought to 1.21.1! Heavy WIP, and my second mod, alongside it's companion, [AND](https://modrinth.com/mod/and).

It will add dozens of true-scale creatures, their behaviors, as well as decor you might find at a dino theme park.

Dig up bones and extract dna to revive old beasts!

To get a guide book, install patchouli, and then in-game, craft the DRE Field Guide!

Adds dinosuars such as:
- T Rex
- Velociraptor
- Allosaurus
- Carnotaurus
- Stegosaurus
- Triceratops

I plan on many more, however I'd like these to be in good shape before moving on.
